fields.Maintenance Content: Replace spindle bearing, calibrate XYZ axis accuracy

knowledge_base.question: Làm thế nào để cải thiện OEE thiết bị?
knowledge_base.answer: Improving OEE requires a three-pronged approach: 1. Increase availability (reduce unplanned downtime, implement TPM); 2. Improve performance rate (optimize cycle time, reduce idling and minor stops); 3. Improve quality rate (reduce defect rate, implement SPC). Start with analyzing the six major equipment losses (breakdowns, setup/changeover, idle, reduced speed, defects, startup losses).

knowledge_base.question: Digital Twin là gì?
knowledge_base.answer: Digital Twin creates a virtual mapping model of physical equipment, synchronizing real-time operational data to enable simulation, prediction, and optimization. In manufacturing, it is commonly used for production line simulation (e.g., Siemens Tecnomatix), predictive equipment maintenance, and process parameter optimization.

knowledge_base.question: Khác biệt giữa Lean Manufacturing và Six Sigma?
knowledge_base.answer: Lean Manufacturing focuses on eliminating 7 wastes (overproduction, waiting, transport, overprocessing, inventory, motion, defects) and pursuing continuous flow. Six Sigma focuses on reducing variation, using DMAIC (Define, Measure, Analyze, Improve, Control) to reduce defects to 3.4ppm. They complement each other; Lean Six Sigma is the best practice.

knowledge_base.question: Làm thế nào để chọn biểu đồ kiểm soát SPC?
knowledge_base.answer: For variable data use Xbar-R chart (subgroup size ≤10) or Xbar-S chart (subgroup size >10). For attribute data use p chart (defect rate) or c chart (defect count). Selection criteria: data type (variable/attribute), subgroup size, and whether constant.
